Text Rendering Test

Font sizes and weights

This paragraph uses 16px body text. Glyphs should appear as shaped characters, not colored rectangles.

Small text at 12px. Should be legible if the font system is wired correctly.

Large bold text at 24px.

Italic text rendered through font-style: italic.

center-aligned text in a rounded box

Hello, world!

If this renders as glyphs, text rasterization (cosmic-text) is working end-to-end.
